ValidationRule.description: Checks to see if the Twilio Messaging Service SID field is populated
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Twilio', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Twilio_Voice' ), Mogli_SMS__Sender_Pool__c, ISBLANK( Mogli_SMS__Twilio_Messaging_Service_SID__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You must enter a Twilio Messaging Service SID in order to use Twilio Messaging Service.
